import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('full-final-pipeline.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Total cells: {len\(nb[\\"cells\\"]\)}'\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    ctype = cell['cell_type']
    has_output = len\(cell.get\('outputs', []\)\) > 0
    src_preview = ''.join\(cell['source']\)[:100].replace\('\\n', ' | '\)
    print\(f'Cell {i} [{ctype}] outputs={has_output}: {src_preview}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\vicky\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\SCS-projects\\Mindspace-voice-agent" && python << 'PYEOF'
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('full-final-pipeline.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Get remaining output from cell 30
cell = nb['cells'][30]
for out in cell.get\('outputs', []\):
    otype = out.get\('output_type', ''\)
    if otype == 'stream':
        text = ''.join\(out.get\('text', []\)\)
        # Print from where we left off
        if 'Gradient Boosting' in text:
            idx = text.find\('Training Gradient Boosting'\)
            print\(text[idx:]\)
    elif otype == 'display_data':
        if 'image/png' in out.get\('data', {}\):
            print\('[IMAGE/PLOT OUTPUT]'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\vicky\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\SCS-projects\\Mindspace-voice-agent" && python << 'PYEOF'
import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('full-final-pipeline.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

cell = nb['cells'][30]
for out in cell.get\('outputs', []\):
    otype = out.get\('output_type', ''\)
    if otype == 'stream':
        text = ''.join\(out.get\('text', []\)\)
        print\(text\)
    elif otype == 'error':
        ename = out.get\('ename', ''\)
        evalue = out.get\('evalue', ''\)
        tb = out.get\('traceback', []\)
        print\(f'ERROR: {ename}: {evalue}'\)
        # Print last few lines of traceback \(strip ANSI codes\)
        import re
        for line in tb[-5:]:
            clean = re.sub\(r'\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m', '', line\)
            print\(clean\)
PYEOF)
